home.title: Ship polished code products with a storefront that feels ready for launch.
home.description: Discover premium templates, starter kits, dashboards, and production-ready code packs built for teams that want to move fast.
home.featuredDescription: High-clarity digital products with strong previews, seller trust, and fast checkout flow.
home.categoryDescription: Organize digital assets by framework, workflow, and use case so buyers can scan fast.
home.sellerTitle: Made for solo builders and product teams
home.sellerDescription: Upload source files, manage previews, and keep your marketplace footprint clean as the catalog grows.
home.finalTitle: Turn internal quality into a storefront advantage
home.finalDescription: Launch your own code marketplace, keep the catalog curated, and add more commerce features later without rebuilding the foundation.

products.title: Product catalog
products.description: Browse premium code assets, filter by category, and add what you need before signing in.
products.noResultsDescription: Try another keyword or switch back to a wider category view.

sell.title: Sell your code
sell.description: Upload digital products, attach previews, and keep your seller workflow simple from day one.
sell.guestDescription: Your seller workspace uses your account session so you can manage products and orders later.
sell.formDescription: Keep product naming clean, describe the use case clearly, and upload the final source file.
sell.listingsDescription: A simple seller view for today, with room for analytics and order tools later.

profile.title: Your library
profile.description: Review account status, purchased products, and download the code you already own.
profile.guestDescription: Sign in to view purchased products, download files, and manage your account.
profile.purchasesDescription: Every completed checkout appears here with direct download access.

auth.loginDescription: Login to keep your cart, complete checkout, and manage your purchased library.
auth.signupDescription: Start with a simple account now and layer in richer commerce features later.

cart.title: Cart
cart.description: Your selected code products stay here even if you login later.
cart.emptyDescription: Add a few products first. Your selection will stay with you on this device.
cart.authNotice: Checkout requires login, but your cart will stay intact.

labels.productsConnectedToCategory: products connected to this catalog category.

status.backendUnavailable: Backend data is currently unavailable. The storefront shell is ready, and product data will populate as soon as the NestJS API is running.
